Array.Engligh: Find Wraithmonger, the phantom trader, to purchase rare arms and strong upgrades.
Array.Chinese: 找到幽灵商人Wraithmonger，购买稀有武器和强大的升级。

Array.Engligh: Seek the Totem of Ascension in the wilds. Spend your hard earned Dark Credits to raise your weapon to the next level.
Array.Chinese: 在荒野中寻找提升图腾。花费你辛苦赚来的暗黑币来提升你的武器到下一个级别。

Array.Engligh: War Caches are scattered across the map. Hunt them early to outfit yourself with better armour.
Array.Chinese: 地图上到处都是军火库。尽早搜寻他们，为自己装备更好的盔甲。

Array.Engligh: Deploy a banner to grant <color=#00FFA6>10%</color>  Damage Increase and <color=#00FFA6>10%</color> Damage Reduction to allies in range. It lasts <color=#00FFA6>10s</color>, with a <color=#00FFA6>60s</color> cooldown.
Array.Chinese: 部署旗帜，旗帜范围内获得 <color=#00FFA6>10%</color> 伤害增加和 <color=#00FFA6>10%</color> 伤害减免。旗帜持续 <color=#00FFA6>10秒</color> ， 冷却时间<color=#00FFA6>60秒</color>。

Array.Engligh: Deploy a banner to grant <color=#00FFA6>15%</color>  Damage Increase and <color=#00FFA6>15%</color> Damage Reduction to allies in range. It lasts <color=#00FFA6>15s</color>, with a <color=#00FFA6>55s</color> cooldown.

Array.Chinese: 部署旗帜，旗帜范围内获得 <color=#00FFA6>25%</color> 伤害增加和 <color=#00FFA6>25%</color> 伤害减免。旗帜持续 <color=#00FFA6>25秒</color> ， 冷却时间<color=#00FFA6>45秒</color>。

Array.Engligh: Slows nearby enemies by <color=#00FFA6>10%</color>  in a <color=#00FFA6>3</color> -unit radius. This effect lasts <color=#00FFA6>10s</color> , with a <color=#00FFA6>60s</color> cooldown.
Array.Chinese: 使周围 <color=#00FFA6>3</color>  单位范围内的敌人减速 <color=#00FFA6>10%</color> 。效果持续 <color=#00FFA6>10</color>  秒，冷却时间 <color=#00FFA6>60</color>  秒
